## Your Legal Case Analysis

### SITUATION SUMMARY
I understand that you, Still, are going through a difficult time, experiencing physical violence at home. I acknowledge the seriousness of your situation and the urgency with which you need advice. You are currently still living with the person who is abusing you and have not yet reported this to the police or any authority. You do have evidence in the form of WhatsApp chats, SMS, and emails.

### LEGAL RIGHTS
As a victim of domestic violence in India, you have the right to protection under the **Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005 (PWDVA)**.
